title: Zinia's Art Journal Collage
excerpt: Hello everyone! It’s Zinia here and today I’m back with a different type of project. I had a bunch of scraps laying around on my desk when it hit me. It would be so much fun to use small scraps…
body:
Hello everyone! It’s Zinia here and today I’m back with a different type of project. I had a bunch of scraps laying around on my desk when it hit me. It would be so much fun to use small scraps of pattern paper to create a collage spread in my art journal!

The first thing you need to do is to gather up all your scraps. If you are not hoarding your scraps that’s ok, the Patchwork Show paper from Hustle and Heart is the perfect paper for this technique. After you gather up (or cut down) your scraps, divide them in color families. This will help you assemble a balanced page where the colors are evenly spread.

For some final touches I added a few splatters with ink sprays and also some ephemera pieces from On a Whim in colors that matched my colorful blocks.

I really hope you enjoyed this and you got inspired to create beautiful artsy collages with your scraps. Until next time, happy crafting.

Zinia

Abstract Inspiration Blog | Instagram | Twitter | Facebook

SUPPLY LIST: HUSTLE & HEART 12x12 Paper - Patchwork Show (340877), On a Whim EPHEMERA (378750), Gel Medium, Water-soluble Markers

Thanks so much for sharing this creative collage, Zinia! Other Design Team member posts can be found here. Shop HUSTLE & HEART now! Check your local retailer and online at Simon Says Stamp and Scrapbook.com
